description: List, eight columns, of more than 180 names receiving alms. Many payments of 1/8 dinar. Many foreigners, designated as such: Palestine 13; Iraq 12; Syria-Lebanon 7; Rum 3; Sicily 2; Qayrawan 1; Barqa 1; Spain 1. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 441, App. B 8)
tags: communal, charity, poverty, gift of money, recipients
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
